record.field:
config_params = env['ir.config_parameter'].sudo()
odoo_proxy_base_url = config_params.get_param('clv_api.odoo_proxy_base_url') if not odoo_proxy_base_url: odoo_proxy_base_url = 'https://odooproxy.cleverence.com'
server_url = config_params.get_param('web.base.url') db_name = env.cr.dbname db_uuid = config_params.get_param('database.uuid') login = env.user.login name = env.user.name lang = env.user.lang is_admin = env.user.has_group('base.group_system')
module_version = '' module = env['ir.module.module'].search([('name', '=', 'clv_api')], limit=1) if module: module_version = module.installed_version
clv_token = config_params.get_param('clv_api.clv_token') if not clv_token: clv_token = ''
clv_custom_instance_url = config_params.get_param('clv_api.custom_instance_url') if not clv_custom_instance_url: clv_custom_instance_url = ''
clv_environment = config_params.get_param('clv_api.env') if not clv_environment: clv_environment = ''
payload = '{{"odooServerUrl": "{}", "odooDatabaseName": "{}", "odooDatabaseUUID": "{}", "odooUserLogin": "{}", "odooUserName": "{}", "odooUserLang": "{}", "odooUserIsAdmin": {}, "clvToken": "{}", "clvModuleVersion": "{}", "clvCustomInstanceUrl": "{}", "clvEnvironment": "{}"}}'.format(server_url, db_name, db_uuid, login, name, lang, str(is_admin).lower(), clv_token, module_version, clv_custom_instance_url, clv_environment) payload = b64encode(payload.encode('utf-8')).decode('utf-8')
# Convert to url-safe base 64 string payload = payload.replace("+", "-").replace("/", "_").replace("=", "")
action = { 'type': 'ir.actions.act_url', 'url': '{}/apps/w15?payload={}'.format(odoo_proxy_base_url, payload), 'target': 'new', }
